data.title: Amazon Breaks Away From Black And White Monotony To Offer First-Ever Color Kindle: What You Should Know
data.description: Amazon introduced its latest lineup of Kindle devices, including the first-ever color Kindle and the Kindle Scribe, a new e-reader with a stylus.

data.title: YouTube's 'Premium Lite' Plan That Removes Some Ads, But Doesn't Offer Any Other Perks Is Rolling Out To More Countries
data.description: YouTube is expanding its "Premium Lite" plan, which offers fewer ads at a lower price than the standard Premium subscription, to more countries including Australia and Germany.

data.title: Nvidia Supplier TSMC Reports Q3 Revenue, Earnings Beat Amid Rising Demand For AI Chips
data.description: TSMC's earnings came as a welcome relief after ASML spooked AI hardware manufacturers with a lackluster outlook.

data.title: McKinsey Reportedly Trims China Workforce By A Third Amid Rising Tensions
data.description: This decision is part of a strategic move to address security concerns linked to its operations in China.

data.title: Trump Campaign's Snapchat Absence Potentially Gives Harris Edge Among Young Voters
data.description: Donald Trump's 2024 campaign has opted not to advertise on Snapchat, allowing Democratic nominee Kamala Harris to dominate the platform with over $5.3 million in ad spending, targeting young voters.
